actions_taken: Tightened max_position_pct from 0.20 to 0.15 in /home/ubuntu/trading/ai-trading-bot/src/agents/risk_config.yaml. Rationale: caps compound single-name risk while the strategy continues to add correlated BFSI names. Non-punitive — every current holding (max 9.78%) and every OPEN order (max 7.35%) remains comfortably inside the new cap, so no liquidation or cancellation is forced; only sizing of future entries is constrained. Direct per-sector caps are not a parameter the current config exposes, so a tighter per-name ceiling is the closest lever to the actual risk vector.
Retained min_confidence = 0.55 override from strategy agent (2026-04-20). No risk-side reason to revisit this tick.

Did NOT tighten max_deployed_pct (0.80), daily_loss_limit_pct (0.03), or drawdown thresholds: deployment is still 22.66% with massive headroom, daily P&L is flat, and drawdown is zero — tightening any of those now would be a preemptive overreach with no matching risk signal.
